ui_label: Pre-industrial conditions, with sea surface temperature (SST/tos) and sea ice concentration (SIC/siconc) prescribed using an annually-repeating climatology from a 30-year or greater period from the piControl simulation of the host model
description: DECK: Effective radiative forcing control simulation
branch_information: Branch from `piControl` at a time of your choosing. Given that you are using a climatology from your own model as boundary conditions, we recommended branching from the mid-point of the period over which you calculated the climatology (but this recommendation may not be appropriate for all models, so ultimately it is up to you to decide what introduces the smallest 'shock'/'jump' at the branch time).
